filters._comment: What counts as relevant. Edit freely; the ingest script reads this on every run. categories: keep only postings in this set. include_intl: keep non-US roles (flagged, not dropped) per the brief. require_intern_keyword_for_ats: only keep ATS roles whose title looks like an internship (the community repos are already intern-only).
